purpose: Author/title/identifier search-key matrix for the Haqiqi witness census. The matrix combines the modern-academic baseline with 19th-c. Orientalist forms, Soviet/Azerbaijani query forms, and additional Arabic-script orthographic variants.

nineteenth_century_orientalist._note: How Rieu, Blochet, Pertsch, Ethé, and other 19th-c. cataloguers would have rendered the name.

soviet_russian_azerbaijani._note: Forms used in Soviet-era cataloguing systems; relevant for Yerevan/Baku/Tashkent/Dushanbe holdings.

arabic_script._note: Multiple orthographic variants reflect cataloguer drift; both the dotted-yā and dotless-ya variants (حقىقى vs حقیقی) are attested.

catalogue_context_keys._note: Catalogue-context terms used to find Haqiqi witnesses indexed under generic descriptors rather than author. Search these AND/OR with author+title forms when the author-direct query returns zero.
european_catalogue_descriptors: recueil de poésies persanes et turques

scribe_and_colophon_keys._note: Scribe-name search keys: may find sibling manuscripts by the same scribe.

nesimi_adjacency_keys._note: Nesîmî/Hurufi adjacency mining keys for mecmûʿa sweeps. Haqiqi poems demonstrably travel inside Nesîmî collections (Ankara MK A 5252 evidence).

modern_editions_and_studies_for_backchai._note: Edition backchain keys. For each editor/author: which manuscript(s) used as base text? Cited as variants? Saw firsthand? Includes editions plus the Demirci 1997 article/study that introduced Süleymaniye Fatih 3808 + Ankara DTCF I/2221.

editions_and_studies.note: Article/study (not a critical edition). Introduced Süleymaniye Fatih 3808 + Ankara DTCF I/2221 as the iki yeni nüsha; see Macit 2000 verbatim citation.

142 + 1 pp; 15 cm; Cyrillic; Klassik Azərbaycan ədəbiyyatı series. Per ek.anl.az 2026-05-11 round, this is the 1986 Bakı Yazıçı 'Seçilmiş əsərləri' edition; v1.0 deposit conflated it with the 2006 Şərq-Qərb edition (now split out below).

editions_and_studies.editor: Rahimov, Hüseynzadə & Hacı Mail (red. M. Mailoğlu)
editions_and_studies.note: 152 pp; 15 cm; Klassik Azərbaycan ədəbiyyatı series. Distinct from the 1986 Yazıçı edition (different publisher Şərq-Qərb, different editorial team Hacı Mail replacing Əliyev). v1.0.1 correction F-V1-CORRECTION-2 via ek.anl.az probe 2026-05-11.

Qəzəllər və rübailər; 109 + 1 pp; 14 cm; Arabic script (NOT Cyrillic). Editors Rəhimov + Əliyev without Hüseyinzade. Arabic-script transliteration target is likely Iranian-Azerbaijani diaspora audience. F-EDITION3 via ek.anl.az probe 2026-05-11.

Şeirlər; 103 + 4 pp; 17 cm; Cyrillic. v1.0 deposit attributes this 1966 Yerevan edition to Hüseyinzade as compiler/editor; ek.anl.az records 'Ə. Yerevanlı' as redaktor. Possible Soviet editorial-role distinction (Yerevanlı=redaktor / Hüseynzadə=tərtibçi). 8 copies held at ANL Baku; ILL pathway. F-V1-CORRECTION-1.

'Cahanşah Həqiqi' chapter in 'Keçmişimizdən gələn səslər. II buraxılış'. S. 3-4-47. Pre-dates 1986 Bakı Yazıçı edition by 4 years; potentially the source for 1986 base text. F-EDITION2a via manuscript.az probe 2026-05-11.

Newspaper article on Cahanşah Həqiqi dated 4 iyun 1987. F-EDITION2c via manuscript.az probe 2026-05-11. Brief popular-history piece; cited as evidence of Az popular reception, not as critical edition.

Persian poems edition; second/updated edition by the same editor. Surfaced 2026-05-11 via ISAM Yordam direct GET-form exercise (chunk C2 finding F-EDITION1); not in v1.0 deposit. Add to backchain matrix for v2.0 textual-criticism collation work.
